hubspot.label: HubSpot focus
hubspot.plan_line: HubSpot for CRM — deals, pipeline, contacts, companies, and engagements.
hubspot.base_notes: Read deals/pipeline, contacts, companies, tickets, line items, products, lists, and engagements (calls/emails/meetings/notes) via the official HubSpot MCP server (list/search/batch-read). Strong for pipeline and B2B churn root-cause. Use only read tools. WARNING: the server exposes write tools (manage_crm_objects, batch create/update) and has no read-only flag — read-only depends on granting only *.read OAuth scopes and the connecting user's role (see SETUP.md); never create, update, or delete records.
